tasks.name: Execution preflight gate (feature start)
tasks.description: Validate Planning Pack mechanical invariants, cross-platform cadence wiring, and smoke/playbook parity before starting OR0.
acceptance_criteria: execution_preflight_report.md is completed with a concrete recommendation.
tasks.json wiring is correct: schema v4, checkpoint_boundaries, CP1-ci-checkpoint, and boundary-only platform-fix tasks exist only for OR1.
manual_testing_playbook.md and smoke scripts are runnable and mirror the same assertions.
start_checklist: Run: make triad-orch-ensure FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/agent-hub-concurrent-execution-output-routing"
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, specs, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Complete execution_preflight_report.md with ACCEPT or REVISE and required fixes
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

tasks.name: OR0 code
tasks.description: Implement OR0 envelope enforcement + canonical agent_event trace persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Run: cargo fmt → exit 0
Run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings → exit 0

Read OR0-spec.md and referenced decision register entries
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="OR0-code"

tasks.name: OR0 test
tasks.description: Add tests for OR0 envelope invariants and agent_event trace persistence shape (flattened record).
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: required envelope fields present, unsafe channel is dropped, and agent_event records contain required correlation fields at the record top level.
Tests are deterministic and scoped (use temp dirs and scoped env vars; no reliance on global machine state).
start_checklist: Do not edit planning docs inside the worktree.
Read OR0-spec.md and referenced decision register entries
end_checklist: cargo fmt
Run targeted tests touched/added
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="OR0-test"

tasks.name: OR1 test
tasks.description: Add tests for PTY passthrough non-injection, buffering/drop semantics, and warning record emission.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: no structured output printed during PTY passthrough, deferred structured output printed after passthrough ends, and warning record emitted exactly once when drops occur.
Tests cover config clamp warning record emission for repl.max_pty_buffered_lines.
Tests are deterministic and do not rely on a real terminal or global machine state.
start_checklist: Do not edit planning docs inside the worktree.
Read OR1-spec.md and referenced decision register entries
end_checklist: cargo fmt
Run targeted tests touched/added
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="OR1-test"

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run cross-platform compile parity + feature smoke for slice OR1 (schema v4 checkpoint boundary).
acceptance_criteria: CI audit ledger is created/updated for the checkpoint.
Compile parity is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.
Feature smoke is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA on behavior platforms.
CI Testing (quick) is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.

tasks.name: OR1 slice (integration Linux)
tasks.description: Linux platform-fix integration task (record evidence even when no code changes are needed).
acceptance_criteria: linux smoke is green for this slice
start_checklist: Run on linux host if possible
git checkout feat/agent-hub-concurrent-execution-output-routing && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, OR1-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/agent-hub-concurrent-execution-output-routing" TASK_ID="OR1-integ-linux"
end_checklist: Dispatch platform smoke via CI: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/agent-hub-concurrent-execution-output-routing" PLATFORM=linux SMOKE_SLICE_ID="OR1" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="feat/agent-hub-concurrent-execution-output-routing" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=1
If smoke fails: apply a minimal platform fix, then rerun smoke until green
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="OR1-integ-linux"
